title: critoniopsis ovata
intro: Critoniopsis ovata, also known as the California fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the western coastal regions of North America, and its leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Critoniopsis ovata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
